steps.title: Identify the target meaning from the example
steps.content: The key clue is the marketing campaign that helped the novel succeed. A marketing campaign's function is to generate public awareness and attention—that's the meaning we need from the blank.

steps.title: Match the word to the target meaning
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean public attention or awareness — the thing a marketing campaign generates that made the novel succeed. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — Originality: "its originality helped the novel succeed" — originality means novelty or uniqueness; a marketing campaign creates attention, not originality. ✗
  • Choice B — Publicity: "its publicity helped the novel succeed" — publicity means public attention and promotion, exactly what a marketing campaign produces. ✓
  • Choice C — Complexity: "its complexity helped the novel succeed" — complexity means intricacy or difficulty; a marketing campaign doesn't generate complexity. ✗
  • Choice D — Practicality: "its practicality helped the novel succeed" — practicality means usefulness in real situations; unrelated to what marketing campaigns accomplish. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
